blockingIssues.description: Retry control presence and wiring assertions remain non-specific; tests can pass by interacting with unrelated buttons rather than the error-state Retry path.
Monotonic guard allows small negative time deltas (`>= -0.001`), permitting real backward cursor movement that should remain rejected.
Backfill cursor monotonicity still allows backward movement up to epsilon, violating strict non-decreasing cursor semantics.
Switch-failure branch sets error state without emitting an accessibility announcement, leaving required error transition announcements incomplete.
Regression tests remain store-centric and do not directly assert DashboardQuickSwitchView error rendering/actions (Retry/Open Settings) at the view surface.
No view-level test forces switch failure and asserts failure announcement; current tests mainly validate success/same-profile or stubbed launch paths.
Monotonic check accepts small negative deltas, reintroducing backward-movement allowance contrary to strict backward-rejection contract.
Popover assertions are primarily store/service tests and do not validate contract-required popover UI interaction/accessibility paths.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require assertion-backed surface-level UI verification for dashboard/popover fixes (explicitly instantiate and assert target SwiftUI views and action wiring), not store-proxy checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Multiple failing fast-surfaces UI reviews reported store-centric tests that did not prove required view-level rendering and announcement behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Enforce manual UI sanity-check evidence and context-read command evidence before allowing `followedProcedure=true` in handoffs.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Several reviewed switcher-ui handoffs reported `followedProcedure=true` with `interactiveChecks: []` and no context-read evidence in verification commands.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Tighten procedure compliance checks so required AGENTS/library reads and mandatory validation steps must be evidenced in handoff verification when `followedProcedure=true`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review reports repeatedly observed missing required context-read evidence despite `followedProcedure=true` in backfill/reconciliation feature handoffs.

rejectedObservations.observation: Treat every skill mismatch as requiring immediate skill reassignment rather than review note.
Update architecture docs immediately from reviewer observations.
